HGSS.373.0001:
[0103,0000,0000], right?
Some guy wearing glasses was looking\r
for you.\f
See for yourself. He’s waiting for
you at the Poké Mart.
HGSS.373.0002:
[0103,0000,0000], right?
Some guy wearing glasses was looking\r
for you.\f
See for yourself. He’s waiting for
you at the Poké Mart.\f
HGSS.373.0003:
Have you gone to the Pokémon Gym?\f
You can test your Pokémon and
yourself there.\f
It’s a rite of passage for all Trainers!
HGSS.373.0004:
Have you gone to the Pokémon Gym?\f
You can test your Pokémon and
yourself there.\f
It’s a rite of passage for all Trainers!\f
HGSS.373.0005:
You have some good Pokémon there.\f
It must be from the training you gave
them around Violet City.\f
The training at the Gym must have
been especially helpful.\f
As a souvenir of Violet City, take this.\f
It increases the power of
Grass-type moves.\f
HGSS.373.0007:
Your experiences in Violet City
should be useful for your journey.
HGSS.373.0010:
WROOOOAR!\f
PEOPLE RUN WHEN I ROAR!
BUT YOU CAME LOOKING!\f
THAT PLEASES ME!
NOW TAKE THIS!\f
HGSS.373.0012:
WROOOAR!
IT’S ROAR!\f
EVEN POKéMON RUN
FROM A GOOD ROAR!
HGSS.373.0014:
How would you like to have this
tasty, nutritious SlowpokeTail?\f
For you right now, just $1,000,000!
You’ll want this! [0200,0000]
HGSS.373.0015:
Tch! I thought kids these days
were loaded...
HGSS.373.0016:
You don’t want it?
Then scram. Shoo!
